function.name: estimate_daily_calories
function.long_description: Estimates the daily calorie intake required to maintain body weight based on age, gender, height, weight, and physical activity level using a standard metabolic formula.

gender.description: Gender of the person (male or female)

activity_level.description: Activity level (sedentary, light, moderate, active, very active)

example_user_queries: Estimate daily calories for a 30-year-old male, 78 kg, 175 cm, moderately active.
How many calories does a 26-year-old female at 62 kg, 168 cm, lightly active need per day?
Calculate daily calorie needs for gender male, age 41, weight 85 kg, height 182 cm, activity level sedentary.
Find maintenance calories for a 35-year-old female who is 70 kg, 170 cm, and very active.
Estimate calories for a 29-year-old male, 92 kg, 188 cm, activity level active.
Work out daily calorie requirements for a 22-year-old female, 54 kg, 160 cm, moderately active.
How many calories should a 48-year-old male at 81 kg and 176 cm eat if activity level is lightly active?
Calculate calorie needs for a 33-year-old female, 66 kg, 164 cm, sedentary lifestyle.
Estimate daily calories with gender female, age 27, weight_kg 58, height_cm 162, activity_level active.
Give me the daily calorie estimate for a 39-year-old male, 74 kg, 173 cm, very active.
